summary: Media Proxy Concurrent Performance Fix Testing Complete - All features verified. Backend: 11/11 tests passed including concurrent request handling (5 requests in 0.16s, 10 requests in <5s). Frontend: Hero poster loads REAL image (naturalWidth=800), all 5 trending story cards show real images, no console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: media_proxy.py line 10: asyncio.to_thread() used for all S3 calls - prevents event loop blocking
media_proxy.py line 24-40: LRU cache implementation with 150 entries, 1 hour TTL
media_proxy.py line 168-188: Auto-resize for images >300KB even without ?w parameter
media_proxy.py line 179-197: Cache check before S3 call, cache set after resize
Dashboard.js line 120: Hero poster uses resize=800 to avoid 2MB PNG downloads
Dashboard.js line 128: Rotation interval increased to 8s for better UX
Dashboard.js line 138: Poster timeout increased to 10s for slow connections
Dashboard.js line 674: Preload uses resize=400 for thumbnails
SafeImage.jsx: IntersectionObserver for lazy loading, safeMediaUrl for R2 conversion
seed_data_creation: None - used existing story: The Painter of Stars (261430a2-28f5-4c40-bac2-35f8d275fae7)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Concurrent performance fix fully verified. Key findings: 1) asyncio.to_thread() wraps all boto3 S3 calls - 5 concurrent requests complete in 0.16s (not 5x0.14s=0.7s), 2) LRU cache working - second request faster than first, 3) Auto-resize for images >300KB working, 4) Hero poster loads REAL image with naturalWidth=800 (not gradient fallback), 5) All 5 trending story cards show real images, 6) Public landing page: 10/10 images loaded, 0 failed, 7) No console errors on dashboard or landing page.
